{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Life Icon
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Life Icon]] takes the form of a flowering tree.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
